market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Cozy 4‑Guest Home Near Pub – Luxury Stay
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to Plough House, an entire‑home haven perfectly suited for up to four guests. Nestled in a charming neighbourhood, this stylish property combines comfort with convenience – just steps from the local pub where you can enjoy a generous 50 % discount on breakfast. Every detail has been thoughtfully curated: a bright, open‑plan living area invites you to relax after a day of exploring, while the fully equipped kitchen lets you prepare meals just the way you like them. Two well‑appointed bedrooms offer plush bedding and ample storage, and the modern bathroom features fresh towels and premium toiletries. With a nightly rate of £212.80, you’ll experience a boutique‑level stay that rivals higher‑priced hotels, all while enjoying a remarkable 4.99 rating from 331 satisfied guests. Whether you’re traveling for leisure or work, Plough House provides a quiet retreat with easy access to local attractions, dining, and public transport. Book now to secure one of the 32 open nights in the next 90 days and take advantage of the exclusive breakfast discount – a perfect blend of value and luxury for your next getaway.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, wide‑angle shot of the main living area with a view of the nearby pub as the cover photo; it instantly conveys the home’s size, style, and the unique breakfast‑discount perk.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £212.8 is 38 % above the city median (£154.6) while occupancy is only 64 % (32 open nights in 90 days) – consider a 10‑15 % price adjustment to capture more bookings.
The description currently provides no detail; a compelling 200‑300‑word narrative highlighting the 4‑guest capacity, 4.99 rating, and 50 % breakfast discount will improve conversion.
No amenities are listed; add high‑value items like free parking, a private garden/patio, and entertainment (board games/streaming) to meet guest expectations and boost perceived value.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing is priced 38 % above the city median (£212.8 vs £154.6) yet you have 32 open nights in the next 90 days – a clear opportunity to raise occupancy.
